description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, plaid checks in red, black, white and grey, black stitch detailing, black and white stripe panel on the in-seam of the collar with appliqued patch, patch pockets on the chest with zippered closures, brand name on the upper left chest, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this red, grey and white plaid shirt shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
